title: OpenCode Database Activation Safety Remediation
pipeline_rationale: The affected scripts replace persistent SQLite DB/WAL/SHM state. RED fault-injection tests, recoverability evidence, independent validation, and honest documentation are mandatory.
test_framework: Pester disposable SQLite fixtures plus PowerShell parser/static checks
summary: Remove unsafe force-kill activation behavior, add explicit writer/handle gates and journaled partial-failure recovery, and prove activation/restoration safety on disposable fixtures without touching the live OpenCode database.
validationCriteria: No force-kill or direct active-set mutation remains in the activation wrapper
Writer, maintenance-lock, and exclusive-handle gates fail closed
Every injected partial transition recovers byte-for-byte or preserves an explicit manual-recovery state
Successful disposable activation and restore pass SQLite quick_check without stale sidecars
Parent evidence rows and deferred live checks are represented honestly
safetyConstraints: No live OpenCode DB access or mutation
No OpenCode shutdown or process termination
No rollback, VACUUM, backup deletion, commit, or push
